headline: General Mills (GIS) Faces Lower Price Target from JPMorgan on Inflation Concerns
summary: With an annual dividend yield of 7.09%, General Mills, Inc. (NYSE:GIS) is included among the 12 Stocks with Highest Dividend to Invest In Now. On June 3, JPMorgan lowered its price recommendation on General Mills, Inc. (NYSE:GIS) to $31 from $36. It reiterated an Underweight rating on the stock as part of its fiscal Q4 earnings […]

headline: Q1 Rundown: General Mills (NYSE:GIS) Vs Other Shelf-Stable Food Stocks
summary: As the craze of earnings season draws to a close, here’s a look back at some of the most exciting (and some less so) results from Q1. Today, we are looking at shelf-stable food stocks, starting with General Mills (NYSE:GIS).

headline: Smucker Trends Show SJM Chasing Growth Beyond the Grocery Aisle
summary: SJM is chasing growth beyond grocery shelves with Away From Home, Uncrustables and Cafe Bustelo, but fiscal 2027 sales pressure keeps it neutral.

headline: Is SJM Stock a Value Buy or a Neutral Consumer Staples Pick
summary: SJM looks inexpensive on earnings and supported by cash flow, but weak fiscal 2027 sales visibility and portfolio repair keep the stock neutral.

headline: SJM Stock Outlook Hinges on Uncrustables and Coffee Margins
summary: SJM's outlook rests on Uncrustables and Cafe Bustelo growth, coffee margin recovery and cash flow, while fiscal 2027 sales pressure tempers the setup.
